item.description: Me, myself and I Always ager to explore the world until its furthest grain, into its deeper detail. Open to collaborate on projects connecting science, visual arts and cinema. Education King’s College London London, UK Msci in Physics 09/2016 – 07/2020 Berkeley University of California Berkeley, US Third Year Abroad, Physics Bachelor 09/2018 – 05/2019 Liceo Classico V. Gioberti Turin, Italy Studi Classici Superiori 09/2011 - 07/2016
